item.name: Illuminati Darkest Gobcoat
item.description: An alchemical potion concocted in the dark laboratoriums of the Illuminati. Some of Idyllshire's goblin goldsmiths have applied the unnaturally viscous substance to a variety of precious stones and found that it heightens the attributes of the gear and accessories crafted in their workshops. However, advances in crafting technology have rendered it obsolete.

obj.n: Alexander - The Breath of the Creator (Savage)
